title: linear-thinking-coders
description: Orchestrates paired frontend design councils that synthesize a final design doc, use an approval-gated structured coding path with paired coding lanes, cross-review implementation work, capture model provenance, produce final agent report cards, capture Blue/Logos team failure notes, support optional OpenCode CLI free/OSS model pair heads, use GPT-5.5/Blue/Logos for exact instructions, and use GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark as the first-line Codex coding model with high or xhigh reasoning.
